response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment (00:00-01:17) and the subsequent talk/announcement segment (01:18-04:40). 2. Used OCR to identify the song title as 'シルベ' (Silve). 3. Searched for 'Tokoyami Towa シルベ lyrics' to get the original Japanese lyrics and artist information. 4. Confirmed the original artist/composer is Shohei Koga. 5. Compiled the data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the song 'Silve' (Shirube) by VTuber Tokoyami Towa, followed by an announcement and merchandise showcase for her 6th anniversary live and a CD single release of the song.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa performs her song 'Silve' on stage with purple lighting and stage effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Warning! Warning! 隣り合わせで
May God bless you 言葉の綾ね
Warning! Warning! 彷徨いながら
I will stay true to myself 'cause of you
「はじめから」みたいに
何もない世界に理不尽に囚われる
黙ってしまうほどの恐怖はない。
使い捨てるみたいに手を離したあなたに
「昨日とはまるで違う」って
わかったところでしょうもない
変わっていく身体と
心の中で響くvoice
間違ってなかったと
ただこの空を眺めてる
I still重なってくたび
思い出してしまうのに
誤魔化してしまうのは
確かにあった後悔から？
誓ったはずなんだ
さよならすらシルべにしよう
光に触れるたび願ってしまうように
And still I rise!!
染まっていく必要もない

[...]

いずれ後悔してしまう時が来ても
私はまだ止まらない。
夜空に浮かぶ月の光を
見上げた空に散らばる
星の宝石を道標にして帰る場所

[...]

どれも哀を模したtrue
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Warning! Warning! Standing side by side.
May God bless you, it's just a figure of speech.
Warning! Warning! While wandering around,
I will stay true to myself 'cause of you.
Like "from the beginning"
Trapped for no reason in a world that has nothing,
There's no fear that could make me silent.
To you who let go of my hand as if throwing it away,
"It's completely different from yesterday"
Even if I understand that, it's pathetic.
My body that keeps changing,
And the voice echoing inside my heart.
Just convincing myself that I wasn't wrong,
I'm just looking at this sky.
I still, every time it piles up,
Even though memories come back,
What I keep glossing over
Is it because of the regrets I definitely had?
I should have sworn,
Let's make even our goodbyes a guidepost.
Every time I touch the light, I keep wishing,
And I still rise!!
There's no need to be stained either.

[...]

Even if one day I will regret it,
I still won't stop.
The moonlight floating in the night sky,
Scattered in the sky I looked up at,
A place to return to, with the star jewels as my guidepost.

[...]

Everything is just a truth imitating sorrow.
